,\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=max(1, total_steps))\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Shift to a faster-converging short-budget recipe: AdamW with a slightly larger batch, stronger but still modest weight decay, and a cosine decay matched to the fixed step budget.
